name: DeLeon, Adam
evidence: Construction Administrator at Page, the architecture/engineering firm (ZoomInfo lists a@pagethink.com). Austin zip 78702 and 'Page Architecture' occupation match Page's Austin office. No FEC PAC or TX lobbyist record found.

Austin zip 78753 and county employer corroborate; common name so exact role not fully verified. No FEC PAC or TX lobbyist record found.

name: Lopez, Candace
evidence: Chief Philanthropy Officer / fundraiser at Horizons Foundation, the SF Bay Area LGBTQ community foundation; confirmed as a Horizons Foundation author/staffer (Oakland zip 94607 is in-region). Consistent with 2022 gifts. No FEC PAC or TX lobbyist record found.

name: Casati, Josefina
evidence: Senior Director of Communications at Grantmakers for Girls of Color; award-winning journalist and social-justice storyteller based in Austin (zip 78741). Prior role: Creative/Editorial Director at Pulso. Documented Austin nonprofit board seats. No FEC PAC or TX lobbyist record found.

...Austin PBS Community Advisory Board, Settlement Home for Children, Communities in Schools, and Latinitas.

name: Caballero, Robert
evidence: Courier for FedEx in Austin (zip 78741, near FedEx's E Riverside/Airport Commerce facilities). No individual public profile beyond generic occupation. Small-dollar 2022 Velasquez donor. No FEC PAC or TX lobbyist record found.

name: Mendoza, Leticia
resolved_employer: Texas Disposal Systems (Director of Marketing & Communications, 2018-2024); since 2024 Sr. Director External Communications, Ascension Texas
evidence: Director of Marketing & Communications at Texas Disposal Systems (Austin waste/environmental hauler) Jan 2018-May 2024; since May 2024 Sr. Director External Communications at Ascension Texas. UTEP grad. Not personally a registered TX lobbyist (no TEC match); TDS holds city contracts but her role is comms, not lobbying. No FEC PAC record found.

affiliations.snippet: Participated in leadership programs including Leadership Austin and Hispanic Austin Leadership.
Hispanic Austin Leadership alumna per bio.

evidence: Self-employed owners of Bucket's Deli and Sports Bar, an East Austin sports bar at 2020 E Cesar Chavez St (est. 2008); residence zip 78744. Local small-business owners; very high FEC count (541) consistent with aggregated household small-dollar ActBlue giving, not an ideological PAC pattern. No TX lobbyist record found.

evidence: Juan Meza Jr., General Manager of Juan in a Million (family-owned East Austin Mexican restaurant, 2300 E Cesar Chavez St, est. 1980); manages day-to-day operations. 2026 Velasquez donor. No FEC PAC or TX lobbyist record found.

evidence: Plano/Dallas-area (zip 75025) self-described business owner; a Dallas-based Suzie Yacob LinkedIn profile cites marketing/management experience but the full bio is not publicly readable and could not be firmly tied to the donation record. 2026 Shah (challenger) donor. name: perez, michael j
evidence: Self-described business owner in 'Marketing, Sales & Promotion' in East Austin (78702). Too many Michael/Mike Perez profiles in Austin to confirm a specific individual or firm; no distinctive public bio, PAC, or lobbyist record found.
